_purpose: Durable session-handover context for the Job Bot project. Update this file when compacting chat history so a fresh session can resume without re-deriving decisions. Keep it factual and current; prune anything stale. Update 'last_updated' and append to 'changelog' on each edit.

project.name: jobbot
project.description: Discord bot that discovers software-engineering internships via a configurable search API (Serper/Bing/Brave/Google PSE), extracts + de-duplicates + relevance-filters postings across major ATS platforms, and posts them to Discord as embeds with action buttons.

deployment.target: Single always-on Linux VM (planned: Oracle Cloud free-tier Ampere ARM; fallback: Raspberry Pi). No Docker needed.
deployment.database: SQLite by default (local file, zero external services). Postgres supported by switching DATABASE_URL; only Postgres-specific feature is the cross-process scan advisory lock.
deployment.sqlite_path_note: Use an ABSOLUTE path in DATABASE_URL, e.g. sqlite+aiosqlite:////opt/jobbot/jobbot.db (four slashes).
deployment.process_manager: systemd unit at deploy/jobbot.service (runs as 'jobbot' user under /opt/jobbot).
deployment.oracle_cloud_gotcha: Bot only makes OUTBOUND connections; no inbound VCN/iptables rules needed. /health binds locally.
deployment.docker_status: Docker + Postgres path still fully supported (docker-compose.yml). Dockerfile installs the .[postgres] extra.

key_decisions: Deterministic-first: query gen, URL canonicalization, dedup, and relevance scoring are pure/tested functions. LLM classification is opt-in (ENABLE_LLM_CLASSIFICATION) and only refines an already-passing result.
Protocol-based extension points: SearchProvider and PlatformAdapter are drop-in. PlatformRegistry maps hostnames to adapters.

Bounded query generation (no Cartesian explosion): templates per (platform, title-group), decorated with term/location clauses; select_batch reserves top-priority queries and rotates a window over the rest.

Job identity via dedup_key: platform+requisition-id -> canonical URL -> normalized company+title. Re-discovery updates last_seen; job_versions snapshot only on material content change; Discord posting gated on posted_to_discord.
SQLite chosen over Postgres for single-instance simplicity; advisory lock is dialect-aware (real pg lock on Postgres, no-op on SQLite where the scheduler's asyncio lock serializes scans).
Postgres drivers (asyncpg/psycopg) moved to optional [postgres] extra so base install is ARM-friendly with no compiled deps.

current_state.tests: 64 passing (pytest); pure logic, no DB/network required
current_state.db_schema: 15 tables, created via alembic upgrade head (migrations/versions/0001_initial.py uses metadata.create_all)
current_state.lint: ruff clean; ruff format applied across codebase (ruff 0.15.21)
merged_prs: #1 Run without Docker: SQLite default + Linux VM deployment
#2 Add CI workflow (ruff + pytest + migration smoke) and fix lint
#3 Add pre-commit hooks + enforce formatting in CI

conventions.ci: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs on push/PR to master: ruff check, ruff format --check, pytest, and a SQLite alembic upgrade head smoke test.
conventions.pre_commit: .pre-commit-config.yaml (ruff lint+format + hygiene hooks). Enable with 'make hooks' after 'make install'. Pinned: ruff v0.15.21, pre-commit-hooks v6.0.0.
conventions.workflow: Work on a branch, open a PR, wait for CI green, squash-merge, delete branch. Never commit directly to master.
conventions.secrets: Never commit .env. Config is validated by Pydantic (src/jobbot/config.py) and fails fast.

quick_reference.keyless_dry_run: set SEARCH_PROVIDERS=mock in .env to exercise the pipeline with no API key

architecture_pointers.parsing: src/jobbot/parsing/ (url canon, ssrf guard, jsonld, fetcher, extractor)

feature_flags_and_roadmap.enabled_now: search -> extract -> dedup -> filter -> relevance -> expiration -> Discord embeds + buttons; all slash commands; per-guild scheduling.
off_by_default: Playwright rendering for JS-only job pages (install [playwright] extra) - relevant for Workday/Oracle/SuccessFactors which are often JS-rendered
scaffolded_not_wired: Digests (hourly/daily/weekly) and per-category subscription roles - schema (subscriptions, job_categories) and digest embed builder exist; scheduling them is the next increment

open_items: Optional: enable GitHub branch protection on master requiring the 'test' status check (must be toggled in GitHub Settings > Branches; cannot be set via CLI here).
Deploy to the Oracle VM using deploy/jobbot.service and the README 'Linux VM with systemd' guide.
Consider Playwright path for Workday/Oracle/SuccessFactors postings if JSON-LD extraction returns empty over plain HTTP.
changelog: 2026-07-14 Initial handover.json created after PRs #1-#3 (SQLite/no-Docker, CI, pre-commit).
